default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content creation strategy and process for fwd.digital's software delivery toolkit](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital wants to create educational content around "flaky tests" and related topics in software testing/delivery](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Marcel's company will provide 2 calibration articles by end of day to establish a baseline](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [If engagement moves forward, they can bring on a fractional developer SME within 2 weeks for technical reviews](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Initial content will be copy/pasted into fwd.digital's CMS, with potential integration streamlining later](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

## Topics

### Flaky Tests Content

  - [Marcel asked about the terminology "flaky tests" and its usage](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [David confirmed it's common lingo, especially in big tech, though not much written about it](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Potential topics: educating on what flaky tests are, why they're problematic, how big tech companies solve them](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Positioning fwd.digital's toolkit as a solution companies can buy instead of building internally](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

### Calibration Process

  - [Marcel will send 2 sample "calibration" articles by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Allows fwd.digital to evaluate baseline quality with zero calibration](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Will share with dev advocates to get feedback](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Bringing on SME

  - [For ongoing work, Marcel can bring on a fractional developer SME within \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Less for copy editing, more for technical validating of content](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [fwd.digital to provide criteria for vetting/evaluating SME candidates](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Content Integration

  - [Initial content will be manually copied into fwd.digital's datoCMS](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Over time, can streamline integration to reduce copy/pasting](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Dedicated resource will handle posting to begin with](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send 2 calibration articles on flaky tests by EOD](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [fwd.digital to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [If moving forward, fwd.digital to provide SME vetting criteria for Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Marcel to onboard fractional SME within \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/yvzGUCWmJ5_kBniWDanVEnZY2x-xMHKK?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

action_items.description: Send two calibration articles to David by end of day as examples
Have a subject matter expert fractionally within two weeks to provide technical review of content
